setting: the coastal wastes where the corruption meets the sea
stakes: The final act begins as the corruption's true nature is revealed

cinematicLines.speaker: narrator
cinematicLines.text: The journey ends where it began -- at the edge of the world, where the tide whispers secrets older than the crown.

cinematicLines.speaker: narrator
cinematicLines.text: The corruption has changed. No longer bound to the Hollow's stones, it flows now -- living, breathing, evolving. It has found a new throne in the depths.

cinematicLines.speaker: narrator
cinematicLines.text: Allies gather on the shore. The Tide-Speaker reads the waves. The Forgemaster crafts weapons from shipwrecks. The Reforged fleet waits beyond the horizon.

cinematicLines.speaker: narrator
cinematicLines.text: The crown pulses in your grasp. It knows what comes. Three paths remain: destruction, dominion, or surrender. Each leads to an ending. None lead to peace.

cinematicLines.speaker: narrator
cinematicLines.text: The Heart of the Tide awaits. The final choice approaches. And the world holds its breath.
